name: Namecheap Pricing: Plans, Costs & What You'll Pay
snippet: Domain renewal: Standard TLD rates apply from Year 2 (e.g., .com renews at $18.48/year). The only mandatory fee beyond base pricing is the $0.20 ICANN fee.
